title: Grilled Monkfish Skewers with Croatian Salsa
description: A simple yet flavorful Italian-inspired dish featuring monkfish skewers grilled to perfection and served with a refreshing Croatian-style salsa.
instructions: In a bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, salt, and black pepper.
Add the monkfish pieces to the bowl and marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Thread the marinated monkfish onto skewers.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes per side, or until the fish is cooked through.
Meanwhile, combine chopped parsley, red onion, cucumber, and balsamic vinegar in a bowl.
Stir to combine and refrigerate until ready to serve.
Serve the grilled monkfish skewers with the Croatian salsa on the side.
